dct_title_s:
Pas caarte van de bocht van Gabon Iusſchen C. Formoſa en C. de Lopo
          Gonſalves
dct_alternative_sm: Map of the coast of Gabon from Cape Formosa to Cape de Lopo
dct_description_sm:
Includes title on a piece of masonry, on each side are natives and apes. "The scale is
        illustrated on another rectangular stone block with the head and shoulders of a male and
        female leaning on the masonry." A ship, sea monster and a compass rose with numerous rhumb
        lines decorate the seas. Lower right: 6.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
